products.name: Vintage Table Clock for Home, Silent Melting Clock, Kitchen, Office Table
products.description:
Key Features
【Size】: 30 x 30 cm.
【Material】: Durable metal frame with elegant transparent plastic case. Quartz movement with lower error and damage rate. The smooth movement of the clock provides you with a quiet environment without any buzzing. It will not affect your family's sleep or work efficiency.
【OCCASION】: Suitable for living room, bedroom, office. The melting clock is not only a practical addition to your desk, shelf, table, kitchen counter, and windowsill, but also a perfect creative gift for Salvador Dali art lovers.
【Vintage Style】It's always the small decorative details that set the tone in any family. The concave-convex dial is carefully designed and paired with Roman numerals. It features precise calibration and a very fine pointer. Our French table clocks adopt a vintage hollow design with a delicate shiny faux gold pearl, simple yet elegant luxury. Adds a rustic French Victorian touch to your home, living room, office, bedroom, or shelf.

products.name: Yaticrab 300ml Humidifier with Colorful Running Lights, 2-Speed Mist Mode, 30-35dB Quiet Operation & Auto-Shut Off - Sleek Minimalist Cool Mist Humidifier for Home/Office
products.description:
Product details
Elevate your living or working space with our compact yet powerful cool mist humidifier, designed to bring comfort, style, and convenience to every corner. Whether you're looking to relieve dry air discomfort, add a touch of ambiance, or enjoy a quiet environment, this humidifier checks all the boxes with its thoughtful features and minimalist design.

Key Features That Make a Difference
300ml Large Capacity for Long-Lasting Comfort: Equipped with a 180ml water tank, this humidifier can provide continuous mist for up to 4-6 hours (depending on mist mode), eliminating the need for frequent refills. Perfect for small to medium spaces like bedrooms, offices, desks, or baby rooms—keep the air moist and refreshing all day or night.

Vibrant Colorful Running Lights: Add a playful yet elegant vibe to your space with the built-in colorful running lights. The lights cycle smoothly through a spectrum of vivid hues, creating a dynamic and cozy atmosphere. Great for setting the mood during relaxation, work, or even as a nightlight for kids—you can also turn the lights off if you prefer a more understated look.

Dual Mist Modes: Continuous & Intermittent: Customize your humidifying experience with two adjustable mist modes. Choose Continuous Mist for steady, consistent moisture output when the air is extremely dry, or Intermittent Mist (cycles on/off) for energy-saving and long-term use. Easily switch between modes with a simple touch button.

Fine & Powerful Cool Mist: Adopting advanced ultrasonic atomization technology, the humidifier produces ultra-fine mist particles (≤5μm) that spread evenly in the air without wetting surfaces. The mist is gentle yet effective, quickly relieving dry skin, chapped lips, dry throat, and static electricity—ideal for seasonal changes or air-conditioned/heated rooms.

Ultra-Quiet Operation (30-35dB): Enjoy a peaceful environment without annoying noise. With a noise level as low as 30-35dB (equivalent to a whisper), this humidifier won’t disturb your sleep, work, study, or conversations. It’s the perfect companion for bedrooms and home offices where quiet is a priority.

Auto-Shut Off for Safe Use: Safety is our top concern. The humidifier automatically shuts off when the water tank is empty, preventing dry burning and damage to the device. You can leave it running overnight or when you’re away with complete peace of mind, especially for families with kids or pets.

Sleek & Minimalist Design: Featuring a clean, cylindrical shape and neutral color palette, this humidifier blends seamlessly with any home or office decor—from modern minimalist to Scandinavian styles. Its compact size (small enough to fit on a desk or nightstand) saves space while adding a touch of sophistication to your surroundings.

Why Choose Our Humidifier?
It’s not just a humidifier—it’s a combination of functionality and aesthetics. We’ve focused on every detail, from the quiet motor to the colorful lights and safe auto-shutoff, to create a product that enhances your daily life. Whether you need to combat dry air, create a relaxing ambiance, or simply add a practical yet stylish gadget to your space, this 180ml cool mist humidifier is the perfect choice.

Ideal for Every Scenario
Bedroom: Enjoy a quiet, moist sleep without dryness or noise.

Office: Stay focused and comfortable during long work hours.

Baby Room: Provide a gentle, safe environment for your little one (with auto-shutoff and quiet operation).

Living Room: Add ambiance with colorful lights while keeping the air fresh.

Specifications
Key Features
180ml large capacity for long use
Colorful running lights for ambiance
2-speed mist (continuous/intermittent)
30-35dB ultra-quiet operation
Auto-shut off for safe protection
Specifications
SKU: YA712HA3PQCMANAFAMZ
Weight (kg): 0.3
Color: white

【Massive 64GB Storage - No Internet? No Problem!】

Huge 64GB memory allows you to download many educational videos, cartoons, and songs. Keep your kids entertained during long travels or in areas with no Wi-Fi. It's a library in their hands!

【Powerful 4000mAh Battery - All Day Fun】
Equipped with a large 4000mAh battery, this tablet provides hours of continuous learning and play on a single charge. No more worrying about power cuts or frequent charging.

【High Speed 4GB RAM - Smooth & No Lagging】
With 4GB RAM and a Quad-Core processor, this tablet runs smoothly without freezing. Your child can switch between learning apps and games easily.  High performance at an affordable price!

【Versatile Connectivity】

Supports Wi-Fi, Bluetooth for mouse/keyboard connection.

【Great Birthday & School Gift】

Looking for the nice gift for your child? This 7-inch tablet is the ideal choice for birthdays, holidays, or  school rewards. Make your child happy and help them grow with the great tech gift!

 

7-inch kids' tablet with eye protection screen: Featuring a high-end Full HD 1920 x 1200 display, this children's tablet delivers sharper, crisper images and more vibrant colors than standard HD tablets. It safeguards your child's eyes while allowing them to enjoy their games anytime, anywhere.
Long-lasting Android Tablet: Equipped with a 4000mAh battery, this kids' tablet offers up to 5 hours of reading time on a full charge. Ideal for camping, travel, and long flights, it features 4GB of RAM, 128GB of storage, and a 128GB TF card. You can store a large number of your child's favorite cartoons, e-books, movies, songs, and photos, ensuring ample storage space for your little treasure. 【Parental Control Mode】Specifically designed for children aged 2 to 12, this kids' tablet includes a Secure Kids Mode and standard Android. Parents can easily customize screen time limits, filter age-appropriate content, download new apps, and manage playtime as their child grows.
【Multifunctional Tablet for Kids】Children can read, watch videos, play games, and learn. Google Play offers a wide selection of recent educational apps that parents can download. Examples include YouTube Kids, Khan Academy Kids, Duolingo, ABC Mouse, Minecraft, and Hulu. This fantastic tablet will entertain and educate your child for hours— they'll love it!
Durable Tablet with Anti-Shock Case】Food-grade silicone case and stand, hands-free for children. The case protects the tablet from damage while keeping it portable. The stand behind the tablet allows children to watch videos and talk hands-free. It's an excellent gift for children to help them develop their skills and imagination through joyful play.

products.name: Wudytim Bluetooth Earphone With phone tablet stand- White
products.description:
High-quality audio combined with powerful battery life makes these earbuds an indispensable smart accessory, whether you're commuting, working out, or traveling.

All-in-One Bluetooth Earbuds: See Your Power, Charge with Ease!
Tired of the awkwardness of low battery? Our All-in-One Bluetooth Earbuds keep you in control. The multi-color display screen clearly shows the earbud case's battery level, so you always know how much power you have left.

These earbuds don't just offer excellent sound quality; they also integrate a 1200mAh high-capacity power bank function, easily giving your phone a "new life." And we've got you covered! The earbud case comes with three common charging cables, saving you the hassle of carrying extra wires and truly making your travel 1ighter.

One device, multiple uses, extreme convenience – letting your life be filled with endless possibilities!

Your Exclusive Mobile Energy Station: Colorful Display Bluetooth Earbuds
Say goodbye to battery anxiety and welcome a smart new experience! Our Colorful Display Bluetooth Earbuds bring you convenience with innovative technology. The earbud case features an intuitive multi-color display screen, keeping you fully informed about your battery level so you'll never worry about running out of power again.

Even more surprisingly, it has a built-in 1200mAh emergency power bank, effortlessly boosting the power of your other devices. Most thoughtfully, the earbud case directly integrates three charging cables, adapting to various devices and eliminating the frustration of tangles and forgotten wires.

Measurement interval: 1mmHg
Working temperature and humidity:+40 ℃+10 ℃/40%~85% relative humidity.
Temperature and humidity storage:+ 50 ℃ -20~C/15% -90% relative humidity.
Dear customer:
Hello, I'm glad to serve you, although I'm not sure who can see these words. Although we are in the distant East, we always pay attention to the needs of our African friends.
Therefore, we hope to obtain more authentic product reviews from you, whether good or bad, so that we can promptly eliminate bad products and upgrade more high-quality products to meet your needs. Please believe that we are carefully reviewing your feedback.
We are striving to create high-quality and reasonably priced products, hoping to gain the trust of more friends. Thank you to all those who have followed and trusted us.
Blessings to everyone.

products.name: LM-Voice Blood Pressure Meter & Digital BP Pulse Health Heartbeat Monitor - White
products.description:
Professional-grade accuracy
Intellisense comfort
Large, clear display
Dual user memory
Easy USB charging

1 X Blood Pressure Monitor
1 X Upper Arm Cuff Strap
1 X User Manual(English)

This advanced upper arm blood pressure monitor delivers professional-grade accuracy with user-friendly convenience, making it the perfect solution for reliable home health monitoring. Featuring cutting-edge Intellisense technology, this fully automatic device provides comfortable, precise readings while eliminating the guesswork from blood pressure management.

The monitor's smart sensing technology automatically adjusts cuff inflation to your individual blood pressure levels, ensuring optimal comfort during each measurement while maintaining clinical accuracy. This personalized approach prevents over-inflation discomfort while guaranteeing reliable results every time you use the device.

The large, clear LCD digital display presents all vital information simultaneously, showing systolic and diastolic pressure, pulse rate, and heartbeat detection on three separate lines for easy reading and interpretation. The intuitive interface makes monitoring effortless, even for users who aren't technically inclined or have vision concerns.

Dual user design accommodates two people with 99 measurement memory slots per user, storing a total of 198 readings. The intelligent memory system automatically saves each measurement and calculates rolling averages of your last three readings when you press the memory button, helping you track trends and share meaningful data with healthcare providers. Individual stored readings can be accessed sequentially for detailed historical review.

The monitor utilizes advanced oscillometric measurement principles through the upper arm cuff, providing hospital-grade accuracy in a compact home device. The proprietary denoising filter algorithm and specialized hardware work together to optimize system performance, ensuring consistent, reliable measurements that you can trust for important health decisions.

Convenient USB charging eliminates the hassle of battery replacement while making the device environmentally friendly and cost-effective over time. The durable plastic construction ensures longevity while maintaining a lightweight, portable design that's perfect for home use or travel.

Simple operation requires no special training or technical knowledge. Just wrap the cuff around your upper arm, press the start button, and let the monitor do the rest. The device guides you through proper positioning and automatically delivers fast, comfortable, and accurate readings that meet medical standards, making professional-quality blood pressure monitoring accessible to everyone in the comfort of their own home.

products.name: EAGEAT Unisex Anti Blue Light Protective Computer Screen Glasses
products.description:
Protection for your eyes
Block harmful blue light
Reduce Eye Strain
Comfortable design
Ultra light weight and flexible material
High Quality Material
Perfect Gift

We live totally surrounded by screens, spending almost nine hours a day, on average, in front of digital devices. All these devices emit blue light, and since our eyes aren't protected against this overexposure, the light can be detrimental.
WHAT IS BLUE LIGHT?Blue light is a harmful portion of light emitted by digital screens. According to the Paris Vision Institute, younger people exposed to an excess amount of blue light can start to experience age-related macular degeneration at an earlier stage. Other research states that excess exposure is also the leading cause of vision loss for people over 50.

HOW TO PROTECT YOUR EYESBlue light blocking glasses from our store are specially designed to filter out harmful blue-violet light. This makes screen time more comfortable and help eliminate symptoms of digital eyestrain. Simultaneously, this Blu-ray filter glasses will improve your sleep and make you fall asleep.

FEATURES:
PROTECTION FOR YOUR EYES -Alleviates visual fatigue and discomfort from long periods of web surfing, gaming and working under fluorescent lights with UV400 protection and glare reduction.REDUCE EYESTRAIN -Enjoy your digital time, No worry about eye fatigue, blurred vision and headache.BETTER SLEEP-Amber tint lenses block more blue rays than others and see more realistic. You'll never have trouble with sleeping again.EXCELLENT TR90 MATERIAL-Ultra-lightweight and flexible TR90 nylon frame material for durability and comfortable long-term wearing. Casual frame design keeps you looking professional and stylish while working or playing video games.



Protection for your eyesReduce Eye StrainComfortable designUltra light weight and flexible materialBetter SleepHigh Quality Material

Features:★ UV400 Protection Lens: offers a maximum protection with our multi-layer coating designed specifically to reduce glare, reflect blue rays away from the user and relieve long term eye strain caused by excess electronic device use★Function of Anti-Blue Rays: at least 90 minutes’ wearing of Anti-Blue Rays Glasses before bedtime leaves you free to watch TV and use devices without ruining your sleep★Durable and Bendable Lightweight Frame★Scratch Resistant Lens
